text: Stepping through this sleek, modern space, I feel a mix of curiosity and slight disorientation. The glass walls and empty chairs suggest anticipation, as if something important is about to happen or just concluded. Approaching the vividly colored R+D wall, I am struck by the way words and displays invite reflection on perception and knowledge. The environment feels both structured and experimental, pushing me to question not only what I see but how I see it. I am both participant and observer, reminded of the slippery nature of clarity and the complexity of our understanding.
